details.test: Task 1: Choose cheapest qualifying plan and start signup flow
Task 2: Create Store Support Bot from e-commerce template
Task 3: Add shipping, returns, and order status FAQs
Task 4: Customize chat widget appearance for Store Support Bot
Task 5: Setup weekday business hours routing to Sales
Task 6: Enable lead capture and configure name, email, company fields
Task 7: Analytics previous month highest average messages per conversation
Task 8: Invite Admin and Editor team members and assign Editor to chatbot
